Entity Module¶

Entity module.

Base module for all entity-based game objects.

class model.entities.entity.Entity(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Base abstract class for all game entities.

Provides: - Unique ID generation using class hierarchy prefixes - Position handling (x, y) - Runtime parameter validation - Enforcement of subclass structure requirements

This class is intended to be subclassed and not used directly.

__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS: dict[str, type] = {'name': <class 'str'>, 'x': <class 'int'>, 'y': <class 'int'>}¶

Unique set of parameters for Entity init.

__ID_PREFIX: str = 'E'¶

Unique prefix for Entity class.

__WANTED_FIELDS: list[str] = ['__ID_PREFIX', '__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS']¶

Required fields in Entity subclasses.

__check_parameters(expected: dict[str, type])¶

Validate provided parameters against expected schema.

Parameters:

  • given (dict) – Provided arguments.

  • expected (dict) – Expected parameter schema.

Raises:

ValueError – Raised when invalid or unknown parameters are found.

classmethod __generate_id(prefixes: list[str]) → str¶

Generate unique entity ID.

Format:

PREFIX-PREFIX-00001

Parameters:

prefixes (list[str]) – Hierarchy-based prefix chain.

Returns:

Generated unique ID.

Return type:

str

classmethod __get_prefix_chain() → list[str]¶

Build inheritance-based prefix chain.

Returns:

Ordered list of ID prefixes.

Return type:

list[str]

classmethod __load_parameters() → dict[str, type]¶

Load and merge expected parameters from class hierarchy.

Returns:

Combined parameter schema.

Return type:

dict[str, type]

classmethod __next_id() → int¶

Increment and return class-wide ID counter.

Returns:

Next ID value.

Return type:

int

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_id_counter: int = 0¶

ID counter for the amount of instances created.

property id: str¶

Return unique entity ID.

property name: str¶

Return entity name.

property position: list¶

Return entity position as [x, y].

Raises:

ValueError – Raised when position is not fully initialized.

property x: int¶

Return X coordinate.

property y: int¶

Return Y coordinate.
